powers.label: Recent Deployments
powers.prompt: List recent deployments across my team's services: service name, environment, timestamp, status (success/failed), and deployer.

powers.label: Failed Pipelines
powers.prompt: Show CI/CD pipelines that failed in the last 24 hours: pipeline name, failure stage, error summary, and link to logs.

powers.label: Rollback Status
powers.prompt: Check if any services are currently running on a rolled-back version. Show: service, current version, expected version, and rollback reason.

powers.label: Deploy Readiness
powers.prompt: Check deployment readiness for pending releases: build status, test results, approval gates, and environment availability.

powers.label: ECS Task Health
powers.prompt: Check ECS task health for my services: running vs desired count, recent task stops, OOM kills, and unhealthy targets.

powers.label: Scaling Events
powers.prompt: Show auto-scaling events in the last 24 hours: service, direction (up/down), trigger metric, and current task count.

powers.label: Cost Anomalies
powers.prompt: Check for cost anomalies in my team's AWS accounts: services with unusual spend increase, idle resources, and optimization opportunities.

powers.label: Resource Utilization
powers.prompt: Show CPU and memory utilization for my services: average, peak, and services that are over-provisioned or under-provisioned.

powers.label: Open Alerts
powers.prompt: List active alerts and incidents for my services: severity, service affected, duration, and current status.

powers.label: Error Rate Check
powers.prompt: Check error rates across my services for the last 4 hours: 5xx count, error percentage, and services exceeding threshold.

powers.label: Latency Check
powers.prompt: Check p95 latency for my services: current vs baseline, services exceeding SLA, and trend direction.

powers.label: On-Call Handoff
powers.prompt: Generate on-call handoff notes: active incidents, recent changes, known issues, and items to watch.

powers.label: Certificate Expirations
powers.prompt: Check for certificates expiring in the next 30 days across my services: domain, expiry date, auto-renewal status.

powers.label: Patch Status
powers.prompt: Show patching status: services needing OS/runtime updates, security vulnerabilities pending fix, and compliance status.

powers.label: Security Scan Results
powers.prompt: Summarize latest security scan results: critical/high vulnerabilities, affected services, and remediation priority.

powers.label: Resource Cleanup
powers.prompt: Identify resources to clean up: unused ECR images, orphaned EBS volumes, stale DNS records, and old CloudWatch log groups.
